'''wafadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zalambdodont|zalambdodont]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zalambdodont|zalambdodont]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wafadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæfædhæth|wæfædhæth]] || [[word:wæfædhæj|wæfædhæj]] || [[word:wæfædhæsh|wæfædhæsh]] || [[word:wæfædhæ|wæfædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafafadhath|wafafadhath]] || [[word:wafafadhaj|wafafadhaj]] || [[word:wafafadhash|wafafadhash]] || [[word:wafafadha|wafafadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafadhath|wafadhath]] || [[word:wafadhaj|wafadhaj]] || [[word:wafadhash|wafadhash]] || [[word:wafadha|wafadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafafdhath|wafafdhath]] || [[word:wafafdhaj|wafafdhaj]] || [[word:wafafdhash|wafafdhash]] || [[word:wafafdhaf|wafafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wafadhatha|wafadhatha]] || [[word:wafadhaja|wafadhaja]] || [[word:wafadhasha|wafadhasha]] || [[word:wafadhaka|wafadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wafadhath|wafadhath]] || [[word:wafadhaj|wafadhaj]] || [[word:wafadhash|wafadhash]] || [[word:wafadha|wafadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wafadhathal|wafadhathal]] || [[word:wafadhajal|wafadhajal]] || [[word:wafadhashal|wafadhashal]] || [[word:wafadhakal|wafadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wafadhathatha|wafadhathatha]] || [[word:wafadhajaja|wafadhajaja]] || [[word:wafadhashasha|wafadhashasha]] || [[word:wafadhaka|wafadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wafadhathan|wafadhathan]] || [[word:wafadhajan|wafadhajan]] || [[word:wafadhashan|wafadhashan]] || [[word:wafadhakan|wafadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wafadhathaoro|wafadhathaoro]] || [[word:wafadhajaoro|wafadhajaoro]] || [[word:wafadhashaoro|wafadhashaoro]] || [[word:wafadhakaoro|wafadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
